subject: Mortgage File Submission — Thomas Bergqvist
body:
Hi,

My name is Rosa Marchand from Coastline Mortgage Group (Lic. #MB889023). I
have a new file for your review.

Borrower: Thomas Erik Bergqvist Property: 2847 Signal Hill Drive SW,
Calgary, AB T3H 3N4 Loan Request: First mortgage refinance — $348,000 —
refinancing existing TD Bank mortgage Existing mortgage: TD Bank (matures
March 2028)

Documents attached: Loan Application, Credit Bureau, T4 (2025), Appraisal,
PNW Statement

Please advise on next steps.

Rosa Marchand

Coastline Mortgage Group Lic. #MB889023
